title: Monetary and Fiscal Policy - Bank of Canada
content:
## Subscribe to Monetary and Fiscal Policy Monetary and Fiscal Policy
- Stefano Gnocchi Stefano Gnocchi is the Senior Research Director in the Canadian Economic Analysis (CEA) Department. His research interests include macroeconomics, monetary economics, and monetary and fiscal policy. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Strategic Leadership and Support Research Field(s) : Macroeconomics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Monetary Economics Alma Mater : Universitat of Pompeu Fabra
- Daniela Hauser Daniela Hauser is the Senior Research Advisor in the Strategic Leadership Group of the International Economic Analysis Department. Department(s) : International Economic Analysis , Strategic Leadership Group Research Field(s) : International Macroeconomics , Labour Economics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy Alma Mater : Universitàt Autonòma de Barcelona
- Justin-Damien Guénette Justin‑Damien Guénette is the Director of the Projection Division in the Canadian Economic Analysis Department. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Projection Research Field(s) : Business Cycles , Forecasting , International Macroeconomics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Monetary Economics , Time Series

### Justin-Damien Guénette
- Konrad Zmitrowicz Konrad Zmitrowicz is a Senior Policy Advisor in the Canadian Economic Analysis Department (CEA). Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis Research Field(s) : Applied Econometrics , International Macroeconomics , Macroeconomics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Resource and Energy Economics , Term Structure Modelling , Time Series
- Jane Voll Jane Voll was appointed Regional Director (Economics) at the Bank’s Regional Office for Ontario in September 2008. Department(s) : Canadian Economic Analysis , Survey and Economic Intelligence Research Field(s) : Business Surveys , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Urban and Regional Economics
- Christian Friedrich Christian Friedrich is a Senior Research Advisor in the Financial Stability Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Financial Stability Research Field(s) : International Macroeconomics , International Trade and Finance , Monetary and Fiscal Policy Alma Mater : Graduate Institute of International and Development Studies
- Miguel Molico Miguel Molico was appointed Senior Research Director in the Financial Markets Department (FMD) in February 2024. In this role, he provides strategic direction and leadership for FMD’s research and policy work. Department(s) : Markets and Banking Department , Strategic Leadership Research Field(s) : Macroeconomics , Monetary and Fiscal Policy , Payments Economics Alma Mater : University of Pennsylvania
- Wei Dong Wei Dong is Research Advisor in the Canadian Economic Analysis Department at the Bank of Canada. Department(s) : Financial Stability , Strategic Leadership and Support Research Field(s) : International Macroeconomics , International Trade and Finance , Monetary and Fiscal Policy Alma Mater : University of Wisconsin
